issue_summary: Introduce MethodName orderer to replace deprecated Alphanumeric
javadoc_before:
/** * {@code MethodOrderer} that sorts methods alphanumerically based on their * names using {@link String#compareTo(String)}. * *

If two methods have the same name, {@code String} representations of * their formal parameter lists will be used as a fallback for comparing the * methods. */
javadoc_after:
/** * {@code MethodOrderer} that sorts methods alphanumerically based on their * names using {@link String#compareTo(String)}. * *

If two methods have the same name, {@code String} representations of * their formal parameter lists will be used as a fallback for comparing the * methods.

*

This class has been deprecated in favor of * {@link MethodOrderer.MethodName} and will be removed in 6.0

* * @since 5.4 * @deprecated Deprecated in favor of {@link MethodOrderer.MethodName}. * Will be removed in 6.0 */
